---
title: "WRDS - Bank Regulatory Database"
page-layout: article
---

# WRDS - Bank Regulatory Database

**Provider:** WRDS

## Description

WRDS dataset containing accounting data for regulated U.S. depository institutions, including bank holding companies, commercial banks, savings banks, and savings and loans.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics, Government & Public Policy
- **Data/resource type:** Company & Organization Data, Data Platform
- **Access model:** WRDS Account Required, Individual Account Required
- **Displayed topic:** Company & Organization Data, Data Platform

## Access notes

A WRDS account is required to access this data.

## Links

- [Access resource](https://wrds-www.wharton.upenn.edu/login/?next=/pages/get-data/bank-regulatory/)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
